spec.title: cli-port-finder
spec.summary: A small CLI that finds free TCP ports on a host with rich filtering (range, family, IPv6, reserved-port skip) and a Hypothesis-tested core.
spec.rationale: Operators frequently need a reproducible 'give me a free port' primitive that survives macOS ephemeral-range quirks, docker bridge conflicts, and IPv6-only stacks. Existing tools (`lsof`, `ss`, `netcat -z`) don't compose well into scripts.

milestones.title: core port-probe primitive
milestones.description: Pure-Python function `probe(host, port, family) -> bool` that returns True iff the port is bindable RIGHT NOW. Uses socket.socket(family).bind() under a context manager; releases immediately.

acceptance_criteria.description: probe() returns True for a port we just bound + released, False for a port still bound by a fixture socket
Hypothesis property test: for any port in [1024, 65535], probe() agrees with a real bind attempt on the same address

milestones.technical_note: No subprocess calls — pure socket API. Skip reserved ports < 1024 unless --include-privileged is passed.

milestones.title: CLI surface + click integration
milestones.description: `cli-port-finder [--range LO HI] [--family v4|v6|any] [--first|--list] [--reserved-ok]` — Click app that wraps the core. Exits 0 with the chosen port; exit 1 if none found in the range.

acceptance_criteria.description: `--first` prints exactly one port and exits 0 when at least one is free
`--list --range 5000 5005` prints all free ports in the range, one per line
Exit code is 1 when no port in the range is free (mocked by binding every port in a fixture)

milestones.technical_note: Use `click.testing.CliRunner` for the test surface — no real network in tests.

milestones.title: IPv6 + dual-stack handling
milestones.description: Extend probe() + the CLI to handle IPv6-only hosts and dual-stack systems where v4 and v6 ports are NOT symmetric.

acceptance_criteria.description: On a dual-stack host, --family v6 returns ports the v4 sweep would not have caught
Hypothesis: bound a v4 port; v6 probe of the same port number is independent (passes iff the OS supports IPV6_V6ONLY)

milestones.technical_note: Set IPV6_V6ONLY=1 on v6 sockets so the dual-stack bridge behaviour is deterministic across Linux/macOS.

milestones.title: [CONSOLIDATION] tidy + verify pass
milestones.description: No new public API. Improve test coverage in `tests/property/`, add a CLI integration test, ensure `make verify` runs clean.

acceptance_criteria.description: make verify passes on a clean checkout
No new symbols in __all__ vs the previous milestone

milestones.technical_note: [CONSOLIDATION] — REJECT any new feature additions in this milestone.
